reviews.author: MANTRI TANISHA 8C
reviews.review_body: This is the best school I've ever studied in. Btw I'm studying in this school since 1st grade and i think it's amazing. The teachers, staff and workers are also great.  It's been 10 years yet and I'll be studying 2 more years. Make sure you give it a try ✌️

reviews.author: SSP CREATIONS
reviews.review_body: Very Good School , Good Teachers , All types of sports like football ,badminton, volleyball, basketball, and cricket grounds are available .Education is good .classroom are also maintained neatly.Its Best School overall.Love this school.I am studying in this one now......

reviews.author: Aman Mandal
reviews.review_body: KV Bolarum is located in yapral, Telangana,India. The school is affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education,New Delhi. Initially the school had I to V classes. The Vidyalaya was initially housed in the impermanent Cavalry Barracks of Bison Canteen near Nag Mandir. The school at the time did not have the modern amenities infrastructure that is present today. The school campus is not so big. Inside the classroom, the benches are not good. Now the school has +2 level with science and humanities stream.

reviews.author: Siva N Prasad
reviews.review_body: It's an amazing school with a lot of diversity. When I used to study here there were no basketball courts, but now things have changed, everything is big and beautiful here. The faculty is amazing and so is the infrastructure!
